titleStmt.title: SII 39.12: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 12. (A.R. No. 12 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE SAME TEMPLE. JAṬĀVARMAṈ ALIAS TRIBHU. PARĀKRAMA PĀṆḌYADĒVA-30TH YEAR [15TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of a village for the performance of the service called Raṇavīraṉsandi in the temple of Tiruchchaṉṉavaṉamuḍaiya-Nāyaṉ[ā]r at Iḍaikkaḍambaṅguḷam alias Iraṇyaśiṅgamaṅgalam, hamlet situated on the east of Tiruttiyūr muṭṭam by Gāṅgēyaṉ, who held the birudas Iravikulamaṉṉaṉ, Ēkāṅgavīraṉ, Urubanārayaṇaṉ, Śiraṅganādar, and Iraṇavīrapperumāḷ for warding off the evil effect of the combination of Sittirai (Chitra) and Saturday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tiṟipuvaṉac
kkaṟavattikaḷ śrī parākkiṟama
pāṇṭiya tevaṟku Āṇṭu 2
Āvatuk ketir 2 10 8 Āvatu vicai
ya varuṣam Āṉi mātam 9 § tiruttiyūr
muṭṭattu piḻār kiḻpiṭākai I
laik kaṭampaṅkuḷamāṉa Ira
ṇyaya ciṅkamaṅkalattu Uṭai
yār tiruccaṉṉavaṉam Uṭaiya
nāyaṉāṟku Iravikula maṉṉaṉ Ēkā
ṅkaviraṉ Uruva nārāyaṇaṉ
ciraṅkanātar Iraṇavirapperumāḷ Āṉa
kāṅkeyaṉeṉ nam Āṭṭaip piṟanta
nāḷ cittirai caṉikkiḻamaiyil varukai
yil pala toṣaṅkaḷun toṣacāntiyāka
Iraṇavīraṉ cantiyāka Uṭaiyavar makāpū
cai koṇṭaruḷi Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi
Uḷḷiṭṭa vyañcanaṅkaḷukku kalveṭṭik ku
ṭutta Ūrāvatu Ivilaik kaṭampaṅkuḷam vaḷai
yiṟ cuṟṟu muṟṟilum māṉa po ḷukkuppu
ṟam maṉittar Iṟaiyili niṅka ḻan te
vatāṉam Oṉṟu pātiyum Iṉṉāyiṉāṟ toru
p potuka yiṉṉāyiṉāṟku mummuṭi coḻaṉ
māḷuvar māṇikkam māḷuvaca
Ippaṭi Oṉṟu pātiyum Iva
ttuk kalveṭṭiṉa paṭi Iṉṉāḷ mutal naṭatti
ḷḷavum paḻantevatāṉam Oṉṟu pāti I
ṟuppāl Uḷḷa Oṉṟu pātiyum Āka Ūr muṟṟu
m cantirātitavaṟ cellak kalliluñ cempilum
veṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Iṉṉāyiṉāṟku Iraṇavirap perumāḷ
kāṅkeyaṉeṉ Amarasamim
Digital edition of SII 39.12 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
